final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] a,
    output reg [3:0] abs_val
);always @(*) begin
        if (a[3] == 1) begin
            abs_val = ~a + 1;
        end else begin
            abs_val = a;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      abs_val <= a; if (a[3] == 0) begin abs_val <= ~a + 1; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: abs_val <= a; if (a[3] == 0) begin abs_val <= ~a + 1; end
